commit_scope: Express GET /api/inventory/flow as an inventory lineage grammar in the BML front-door catalog. The route now has a native high-grammar handler that projects ideas through spec, process, implementation, validation, contributor, contribution, asset, and interdependency primitives while reporting native_observation.python_authority=false.

commands: python3 direct native_route_goal_loop route_status check for GET /api/inventory/flow
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide and wellness passed on arrival. Rust kernel release build passed. The worktree-local pytest path was absent and failed with `zsh:1: no such file or directory: .venv/bin/pytest`; rerunning the same focused test from the existing repo venv while keeping cwd in this worktree passed: 5 passed, 7 warnings. The touched test passed ruff via python3 -m ruff. Direct route-status proof returned ('kernel-native-high-grammar', 'BML', True, True) for GET /api/inventory/flow. The full api.bml checker reports 14 unresolved names on this branch; the same command against origin/main reports the identical 14 unresolved names, so this change did not add to that baseline catalog debt. Native serve compiled the source manifest, listed 38 native routes including GET /api/inventory/flow, and curl returned X-Form-Router: native-kernel with HTTP 503 database unavailable because this local worktree has no database config. Evidence validation, diff check, autostash rebase on origin/main, local PR guard, and strict followthrough guard all passed.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted before PR review and merge.

phase_gate.notes: Local route grammar proof, rebase, local PR guard, and followthrough guard are pass. Commit, push, PR, CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain before production release.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/inventory/flow is now represented in the BML front-door route catalog as a native high-grammar inventory lineage projection rather than only as a Python service endpoint.
test_flows: api/tests/test_runtime_web_api_provenance.py asserts the route-status classification and the presence of the inventory lineage grammar handler and primitive JSON projections.
The BML handler returns native_observation.grammar=BML, handler=api_inventory_flow, projection=inventory lineage grammar core, and python_authority=false.
The full api.bml checker unresolved-name set is unchanged from origin/main.

evidence_refs: deploy/front-door/api.bml defines api_inventory_flow and InventoryFlowRoute for GET /api/inventory/flow.
deploy/front-door/api.bml declares inventory-flow-summary-sql and inventory-flow-items-sql over graph_nodes, spec_registry_entries, runtime_events, contribution_ledger, and graph_edges.
deploy/front-door/api.bml shapes spec, process, implementation, validation, contributors, contributions, assets, chain, interdependencies, queue, and idea signal JSON from native BML functions.
api/tests/test_runtime_web_api_provenance.py proves native_route_goal_loop classifies GET /api/inventory/flow as kernel-native-high-grammar BML.
Focused ruff passed via python3 -m ruff.
api.bml full check unresolved-name set is unchanged from origin/main.
Native front-door serve listed GET /api/inventory/flow -> native (Form handler inventory-flow).
Local native curl returned X-Form-Router: native-kernel and 503 database unavailable, proving route execution reached native persistence boundary.
worktree_pr_guard local mode passed with ready_for_push=True.
check_pr_followthrough strict mode passed with stale_codex_prs=0.
